title: Osskorn Stout
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Osskorn Stout''' was a foamy ale, an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage, served at [[Shanko's Hive]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
